series_metadata.series_description: Air pollution complaint files--contains all complaints received on air pollution.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Continually maintain and update microfilm in operating area ; Paper: Retain six years in operating area, destroy data deemed not useful. Microfilm data that is deemed use- ful and destroy hard copy after microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
